description.unified: For 5sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by [400->800]. When you block, deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by [22%->25%].

For 5sec, increases all allies’ Physical Block Chance by 400 and prepares to leap. While preparing, becomes immune to status ailments. When you block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by 8% and deals Physical DMG to the attacker. When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing Physical DMG and stuns them for 1sec.
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Block Chance by 120.
[Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by 400 and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
[Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to [4->5] times.
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by {0}%. On block, has a {1}% chance to restore {2} Mana to yourself and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
